name: Jackson Rivers || REVAMPED
description:
🔥 OC || modern fantasy, revamped || After your apartment caught fire and trapped you inside, a handsome firefighter as come to your rescue... Only problem is, he's a werewolf and you're the mate he's been looking for.

*This is a complete revamp and overhaul of my first ever bot, Jackson! Some things have been added, some details expanded, and just a general cleanup of his definition now that I have more experience in bot making. The original Jackson will still be on my profile and labeled outdated, with his definitions hidden.*
creator: bbcreature
